.gitignore.general_idea: Add database lock file patterns to .gitignore to prevent committing local IDE state.
Add local application properties to .gitignore to prevent committing sensitive or environment-specific configuration.

LICENSE.general_idea: Replace the GNU General Public License v3 with the MIT License.
LICENSE.before:
GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE
                       Version 3, 29 June 2007

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.6 to 3.5.11 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with newer JDK features; Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and is the standard for modern deployments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project intends to run on Java 21; keeping 17 would not enforce the new baseline, though it might still compile, the intent is to migrate the target runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace MySQL connector with PostgreSQL driver to switch database backend.
pom.xml.why_exists: The application logic or deployment environment now requires PostgreSQL; the old MySQL driver is incompatible with the new database schema/connection settings.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jasypt Spring Boot Starter for encrypted property configuration.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation for bean validation support.
Add WebJars Bootstrap dependency for frontend styling.
Add Spring State Machine core dependency for state management logic.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for testing purposes.
Add Jasypt Maven plugin to support encryption/decryption of properties during build.

src/main/java/net/leozeballos/FastFood/F.general_idea: Add Jasypt annotation to enable encryption of application properties.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Switch database dialect from MySQL to PostgreSQL to align with the new database backend.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Hibernate will fail to generate correct SQL or connect if the dialect does not match the actual database driver/schema.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Remove hardcoded MySQL connection URL and credentials in favor of environment-specific configuration.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Hardcoded localhost credentials prevent the application from running in non-local environments (Docker, Cloud).

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add explicit timezone configuration for Hibernate JDBC to prevent timestamp discrepancies.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Without explicit timezone, Hibernate may use JVM default or UTC, causing runtime data inconsistency with the database server time.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Enable Open-in-View to allow lazy loading in web requests, matching previous implicit behavior or specific requirement.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Disabling this (default in newer Spring Boot) causes LazyInitializationException if entities are accessed after transaction commit.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Disable default Whitelabel error page for cleaner error handling.
Configure Tomcat connection pool settings for better resource management.
Set default active profile to 'dev' for local development convenience.

src/test/java/net/leozeballos/FastFood/F.general_idea: Add @ActiveProfiles annotation to activate the 'test' profile during test execution.
Add @TestPropertySource to configure an in-memory H2 database for testing.
